fields.description: Document Field: fieldname holding a mobile/email (e.g. contact_mobile). Linked Contact: link fieldname (e.g. customer, employee). Role: role name. Static: the number/email itself.
fields.label: Value

fields.description: For Linked Contact: which field on the linked party's contact to use (mobile_no, cell_number, email_id)
